serviceNotes.engine oil: M113 4.3L V8: 15,000 km or 12 months typical EU plan.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: V8 intake service per inspection intervals.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: M113 V8: 60,000 km / 48 months per EU maintenance table.
serviceNotes.coolant: Long-life coolant 160,000 km or 5 years, whichever first.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (W211 petrol proxy; M113 W210 EU fixed Oil Service matches)
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210/S210) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — M113 V8 air filter 60,000 km / 48 months (Inspection table)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W210 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — M113 V8 spark plugs 60,000 km / 48 months
serviceSources.coolant: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — long-life coolant 160,000 km / 60 months (5 years), whichever first
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil preventive ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W210 4MATIC workshop orientation
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential preventive ~60,000 km — workshop orientation
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: 4MATIC / RWD rear differential oil preventive ~60,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory / serpentine belt ~100,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W210 EU maintenance orientation
